keyPointsSummary: 'Want' is used with I, you, we, they (base form)
'Wants' is used with he, she, it (singular)
Want can be followed by a noun (I want water) or 'to + verb' (I want to go)
Negative: do not want / does not want

quickQuiz.hindi: वह एक नई नौकरी चाहता है।
हम एक बड़ा घर चाहते हैं।
वे इस project को खत्म करना चाहते हैं।
quickQuiz.answer: They want to finish this project.
I do not want this book.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह मुझसे बात करना चाहता है।
quickQuiz.answer: He wants to talk to me.

mustRememberRules: 'Want' is used with I, you, we, they (base form)
'Wants' is used with he, she, it (singular)
Want can be followed by a noun (I want water) or 'to + verb' (I want to go)
Negative: do not want / does not want
